name: Jeanne
title: The Saint of a Lost Kingdom

states.name: Jeanne
states.title: The Saint of a Lost Kingdom
states.description: And just like that, the voice of her sister—who had always been by her side—could no longer reach her. No matter how many times she called or prayed to her, she was answered only with silence. For the first time since her sister's death long ago, Jeanne once again felt what it was like to be truly alone.

states.name: Jeanne
states.title: The Saint of a Lost Kingdom
states.description: When she was little, Jeanne would run around within the remains of an old tower with her sister and their childhood friend. Whenever they played hide-and-seek, her sister would always be the first to do the seeking, smiling and laughing as she looked for Jeanne and the friend. But now, no matter where Jeanne hides, she will never again hear those cheerful footsteps or that joyful voice calling out her name. "Mikaela...please find me," Jeanne whispers.

states.name: Jeanne
states.title: The Saint of a Lost Kingdom
states.description: In response to the silence that gave her no answer, Jeanne gently placed a hand over her chest. Her sister's voice could no longer reach her. Even so, she was certain her sister was still with her, somewhere within her heart. "This time, I'll be the one to find you, Mikaela." To bring this new game of hide-and-seek to an end, Jeanne draws her holy sword. And so begins her lone crusade—to reclaim the other half of her soul that was taken from her.
